== Notes for [[Item:Q114382|Q114382]] ==

Atention: she had children with Ordoño and Ramiro. Ordoño was Ramiro's father.

http://www.geneall.net/H/per_page.php?id=44231

Onega?…

Matrimonio I: Ramiro II, rey de León * c. 0900

Hijo del Matrimonio I: Lovesendo Ramires * c. 0940 ~ Zayra Ibn Zayda

Hijos de Ordoño II, rey de León * c. 0860: D.Ramiro ~ D. Ortiga

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
